creator: yamagi@yamagi.org
text:
This one updates x11/rxvt-unicode to version 9.18. Changes since
version 9.16 are mostly bugfixes, therefor this update was easy. The
pkg-plist was checked for correctness and the new port tested on 2
machines. I run with version 9.18 for about a week without any problems.
For the changelog see: http://dist.schmorp.de/rxvt-unicode/Changes

Fix: PORTNAME=	rxvt-unicode
-PORTVERSION=	9.16
+PORTVERSION=	9.18
 CATEGORIES=	x11
 MASTER_SITES=	http://dist.schmorp.de/rxvt-unicode/%SUBDIR%/
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	. Attic
